ops.text:
VERIFY LANE (Wave-2, independent recompute; no LLM spend). VERDICT: CONFIRMED.

Reimplemented accuracy / 15-bin confidence-ECE / Brier(mc+top) / always-opt0 floor / paired FT-vs-floor bootstrap from scratch (no e24_common / repo-ece imports) over the FINAL persisted per-row probs. Every headline number reproduces EXACTLY:

TEST (preds_test.jsonl, n=202): acc 0.6039603960396039 (122/202) == headline 0.604; CI(seed24) [0.5396039603960396, 0.6782178217821783] == headline; ECE-15bin 0.08226470881454917 == headline 0.0823 (ECE-10bin 0.07434702573131924 == e29_report 0.0743); Brier mc 0.52897276186597 == 0.529, top 0.21549815427173252 == 0.2155; floor 0.5742574257425742 (116/202); ci_excludes_floor=False; paired delta +0.0297029702970297, CI(seed24) [-0.0049504950495050, 0.0644801980198019] == headline [-0.005,0.0645], excludes_zero=False; gate_met=False.

POOL (preds_pool.jsonl, n=566): acc 0.5212014134275619 (295/566) == 0.5212; CI [0.4823321554770318, 0.5600706713780919] == headline; floor 0.5035335689045937 (285/566) == 0.5035; ECE 0.0678364263449208 == 0.0678; Brier mc 0.6024218067871414 == 0.602; paired delta +0.0176678445229682 == 0.0177, CI [-0.0035335689045936, 0.0388692579505300], excludes_zero=False.

ROBUSTNESS: recomputed both bootstrap CIs under 5 fresh seeds {1,7,99,2026,314159}; the two gate conclusions (accuracy CI does NOT exclude the 0.574 floor; paired delta CI includes zero) hold under every seed for both frames. Gate evaluated exactly as pre-registered (acc CI-LB > 0.574 AND ECE <= 0.10) -> False. Card decision rule applied correctly: the sentinel-AUC MDE/DeLong does not gate this human-ground-truth arm, and the general card leg (paired CI excludes zero) also fails -> "within noise floor" under either framing. Even a normal-approx paired McNemar MDE (b=11,c=4 discordant, SE~0.019, MDE~0.053) exceeds |delta|=0.0297.

ARTIFACT-HYGIENE NOTE (does not change verdict): two gate JSONs exist. e29_gate.json (mtime 11:40) and out/verify/e29_verify_output.txt (11:49, prior verify lane) reflect an EARLIER scoring pass (123/202 = 0.6089, ECE 0.0449). The FINAL run re-wrote preds_test.jsonl (14:20)+e29_report.json/gate_test.json (14:21); the ledger closing entry (14:23 local) and the headline both use the FINAL run (0.6040/0.0823). e29_gate.json is stale/superseded by gate_test.json. Both runs -> gate_met=False, so the CLEAN-NULL verdict is invariant. Retained: out/verify/e29_verify_indep_lane2.py + _output.txt.
